name: Monitor commercial real estate opportunities from LoopNet with ScrapeGraphAI & Telegram

parameters.content:
# Daily CRE Scanner ⏰

**Automated Market Monitoring:**
- Runs every 24 hours automatically
- Triggers the entire CRE intelligence pipeline
- No manual intervention required
- Consistent market data collection

**Schedule Benefits:**
✅ Fresh data daily
✅ Catches new listings immediately
✅ Tracks market changes over time
✅ Reliable automation

**Configuration:**
• Interval: 24 hours
• Timezone: Server default
• Error handling: Built-in retry
• Next execution: Visible in logs

**What Happens Next:**
→ Triggers CRE data collection from major platforms
→ Initiates complete market analysis
→ Generates daily intelligence report

# CRE Data Collector 🕷️

**AI-Powered Web Scraping:**
- Uses ScrapeGraphAI for intelligent extraction
- Targets major CRE platforms (LoopNet)
- Structured data output with schema
- Handles dynamic content automatically

**Data Points Collected:**
✅ Property ID & type
✅ Size (square footage)
✅ Location details
✅ Pricing information
✅ Lease rates ($/sqft)
✅ Contact information

**API Configuration:**
• Endpoint: ScrapeGraphAI smart scraper
• Method: POST with JSON payload
• Timeout: 60 seconds
• Authentication: Header-based

**Target Platform:**
• LoopNet commercial listings
• Real-time market data
• Comprehensive property details

**Output Format:**
→ Structured JSON with listings array
→ Ready for immediate analysis

parameters.name: user_prompt
parameters.value: Extract commercial real estate listings: property type, size, location, price, lease rate, contact info

parameters.content:
# CRE Analyzer & Dashboard 📊

**Comprehensive Market Intelligence:**
- Processes scraped listings data
- Generates market summary & insights
- Identifies investment opportunities
- Creates actionable dashboard

**Analysis Features:**
✅ Property type distribution
✅ Location popularity ranking
✅ Average lease rate calculation
✅ Below-market opportunity detection
✅ Alert generation system

**Key Calculations:**
• Total listings processed
• Market rate averages
• Geographic clustering
• Opportunity scoring
• Priority rankings

**Alert Triggers:**
• High opportunity count (>10 properties)
• Rate alerts (>$30/sqft average)
• Market anomalies

**Dashboard Output:**
→ Executive summary with KPIs
→ Top 5 property types & locations
→ Priority opportunities list
→ Actionable next steps

# Opportunity Check 🎯

**Smart Conditional Logic:**
- Evaluates if opportunities were found
- Only sends alerts when action needed
- Prevents notification spam
- Optimizes workflow efficiency

**Decision Logic:**
✅ Checks opportunities_found > 0
✅ Routes to notification if true
✅ Skips alerts if no opportunities
✅ Always logs data regardless

**Benefits:**
• Reduces noise in communications
• Focuses attention on actionable items
• Saves API calls when not needed
• Maintains clean notification history

**Routing Logic:**
→ TRUE: Send Telegram alert with details
→ FALSE: Skip notification, continue logging
→ BOTH: Always log to Google Sheets

**Configuration:**
• Condition: opportunities_found > 0
• Type: Number comparison
• Case sensitive: True
• Strict validation: Enabled

# Send Opportunity Alert 📱

**Instant Telegram Notifications:**
- Sends formatted CRE daily report
- Includes market summary & top opportunities
- Only triggers when opportunities exist
- Professional message formatting

**Message Content:**
✅ Market summary with key metrics
✅ Total properties analyzed
✅ Average lease rate
✅ Top 3 opportunities with details
✅ Alert summary

**Setup Requirements:**
• Telegram Bot Token (from @BotFather)
• Chat ID (your Telegram user/group ID)
• Bot must be added to chat
• Proper permissions configured

**Message Format:**
🏢 **CRE Daily Report**
📊 Market metrics
🎯 Top opportunities
⚠️ Active alerts

**Benefits:**
→ Immediate awareness of opportunities
→ Mobile-friendly notifications
→ Formatted for quick reading
→ Historical message log

# Log to Google Sheets 📈

**Historical Data Tracking:**
- Automatically logs daily CRE metrics
- Builds historical trend database
- Enables long-term market analysis
- Creates data foundation for reporting

**Logged Metrics:**
✅ Date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
✅ Total properties analyzed
✅ Average lease rate
✅ Opportunities count
✅ Top location
✅ Alert count

**Setup Requirements:**
• Google Sheets document ID
• Sheet name: 'CRE_Analysis'
• Service account authentication
• Proper column headers

**Benefits:**
• Track market trends over time
• Identify seasonal patterns
• Monitor alert frequency
• Export data for analysis
• Historical performance review

**Data Structure:**
→ One row per day
→ Standardized column mapping
→ Automatic date stamping
→ Consistent data format
